raw.subject: Something I noticed about 5280 Revived Rides – Mobile Detailing in Lakewood
raw.body:
Hi,

I've been following your page and noticed how well you highlight the Max interior package. It's great that you offer 1 FREE add on and 25% Off for new bookings.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet. As a mobile detailing service, having an easy way for customers to learn more about your services and book an appointment could make a big difference in getting more business.

I sketched out a rough idea for a homepage based on the photos and posts you share on Facebook. The idea includes a services overview section, a photo gallery to showcase your work, and a contact section with a map and hours. I'd love for you to take a look and see what you think.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/5280-revived-rides-mobile-detailing-lakewood

If you'd like to discuss turning this into a fully functional website, I'd be happy to provide a simple flat rate for local businesses. Just reply or give me a quick call to get started.
